    1. create()

Class BleScannerFactory

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.BleScannerFactory
public final class BleScannerFactory extends Object
Factory that creates a platform-appropriate BleScanner instance.

The factory detects the current OS at runtime via the os.name system property and returns the matching native implementation:

  • macOS — MacOsBleScanner backed by CoreBluetooth (JNI)

Usage: 

BleScanner scanner = BleScannerFactory.create();

Thread safety: create() is thread-safe and may be called concurrently from multiple threads.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @NonNull BleScanner
    create()
    Creates and returns a new BleScanner backed by the platform BLE stack appropriate for the current operating system.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static @NonNull BleScanner create() throws BleException
      Creates and returns a new BleScanner backed by the platform BLE stack appropriate for the current operating system.

      The returned scanner is not yet scanning; call BleScanner.startScan(ScanCallback) to begin discovery.

      Supported platforms:

      • macOS 13+ (aarch64 / amd64) — CoreBluetooth via JNI
      Returns:
      a new platform-specific BleScanner; never null
      Throws:
      BleException - if the platform BLE stack cannot be initialised (e.g. Bluetooth hardware is absent or disabled), or if the current OS is not yet supported
